commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A maintainer needs to choose the Refresh-row UX compatibility tradeoff; there is no narrow automated repair unless maintainers ask to preserve Refresh as custom.; Cleared: The diff is limited to Swift/AppKit menu rendering, tests, and a changelog entry, with no dependency, workflow, secret, signing, or supply-chain changes. (sha=c6a2d50e292b35173688c1d077433b2b515e38aa)
commands.review_summary:
The PR converts Refresh, Settings, About, and Quit toward native menu-item behavior, keeps Install Update custom for its spinner, adjusts cost/utilization row padding and persistent-row metrics, and updates focused menu tests plus a changelog line.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a standalone issue reproduction; this is a PR review, and the visual behavior is supported by before/after screenshots plus source/test inspection. I did not run the app in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A maintainer needs to choose the Refresh-row UX compatibility tradeoff; there is no narrow automated repair unless maintainers ask to preserve Refresh as custom.

target.title: fix: align menu items and convert action rows to native NSMenuItems
target.body: ## Summary - convert Refresh, Settings, About, and Quit from custom `PersistentMenuActionItemView` rows to native `NSMenuItem`s — only Install Update keeps the custom view since it needs an in-place spinner - add system image names for Settings, About, and Quit so icons render on the native items - align Cost and Subscription Utilization leading edges to 20pt to match the provider name header (was 14pt) - reduce Subscription Utilization hover highlight vertical padding 8→6pt - reduce `PersistentMenuActionItemView` row height 28→22pt to match native item height - shrink Install Update spinner: `controlSize` small→mini, size 16→12pt - fix shortcut field font (`smallSystemFontSize` → default menu font) and widen field 38→48pt to prevent clipping - remove 2pt top/bottom background highlight insets so the selection fills the full row - remove `persistentRefreshRows` tracking and `updatePersistentRefreshRowsInProgress` (no longer needed) ## Tests - update `StatusMenuPersistentRefreshTests` to reflect native item behavior: Refresh now has an action and no custom view; spinner in-progress tests scoped to `PersistentMenuActionItemView` directly rather than via the Refresh menu item - contributor head: full suite passed 4,427 tests - exact rebased head: 30 focused menu/cost/utilization/layout tests passed - exact rebased head: `make check` passed; SwiftFormat clean and SwiftLint reported zero violations ## Verification - exact head: `c6a2d50e292b35173688c1d077433b2b515e38aa` - rebased onto current `main`; maintainer changelog credit added - full-branch autoreview clean (`0.82`) - exact release package built, launched, and remained running - full-resolution contributor before/after screenshots inspected; UI code is unchanged by the rebase/changelog follow-up - exact local menu capture was attempted, but Peekaboo lacks Accessibility and Computer Use timed out ## Screenshots Before: After:
target.author: elijahfriedman

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
